ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category or type of the service */,
  "service_tier" TEXT /* Tier or level of the service */,
  "service_icon" TEXT /* Icon or logo associated with the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each configuration variable */,
  "service_id" TEXT /* Reference to the service the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration variable */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Variable name used in the application */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Data type of the configuration variable */,
  "config_default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration variable */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration variable */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the configuration variable is required */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Whether the configuration variable contains sensitive information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "env_description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "env_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the environment */,
  "env_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each version of a configuration variable */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the configuration variable */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration variable in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of this version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title or position of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_parent" TEXT /* Parent role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Additional permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the configuration variable */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level or severity of the action */,
  "log_additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information related to the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_validations" (
  "validation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the configuration variable */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "validation_error_message" TEXT /* Error message to display when validation fails */,
  "validation_regex" TEXT /* Regular expression for validation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_validations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_environment_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each configuration-environment mapping */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the configuration variable */,
  "env_id" TEXT /* Reference to the environment */,
  "mapping_override" INTEGER /* Whether this mapping overrides the default configuration */,
  "mapping_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_environment_mappings_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_environment_mappings_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_environment_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each service-environment mapping */,
  "service_id" TEXT /* Reference to the service */,
  "env_id" TEXT /* Reference to the environment */,
  "mapping_override" INTEGER /* Whether this mapping overrides the default configuration */,
  "mapping_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_environment_mappings_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_environment_mappings_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_history" (
  "history_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the configuration variable */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration variable */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration variable */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "history_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the changes */,
  "history_diff" TEXT /* Differences between the old and new values */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the configuration variable */,
  "dependent_config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the dependent configuration variable */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_optional" INTEGER /* Whether the dependency is optional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_dependencies_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_dependencies_dependent_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_tags" (
  "tag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* Reference to the configuration variable */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tag */,
  "tag_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_tags_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)
